selected_topic: Deadly “red Sky” Solar Storm from 800 Years Ago Discovered in Ancient Trees
news_angle: Scientists uncovered evidence of a massive solar storm from 800 years ago by analyzing ancient tree rings, revealing a dangerous cosmic event that impacted Earth long before modern records.
why_this_is_news: This discovery sheds new light on extreme solar weather in Earth's history, enhancing understanding of space weather hazards that could affect current technology and space missions.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao dodging fiery red solar flares streaking across a dark cosmic sky, showcasing ancient nature's silent witness to space's fury
image_prompt: anime-style orange tabby cat with mischievous confident grin wearing a sleek black hoodie and cap, agile and dynamic pose dodging bright red fiery solar flares against a starry cosmic night sky, ancient tree rings glowing faintly behind, style vivid cinematic anime, strong tabby markings, expressive large eyes

tiny spacecraft silhouette in one solar flare
caption: Scientists have uncovered signs of a deadly solar storm from 800 years ago hidden in ancient tree rings. Even Hunk Mao knows: some space weather hits harder than a catnip frenzy!
